overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a narrative horror game showing a female protagonist exploring a dimly lit film studio. The character moves from a dark bathroom through a backstage production area with crew members into a dressing room, using a flashlight to illuminate detailed environments while supernatural elements and narrative text appear.

scene_state.functional_zone: small dark bathroom with mirror and sink

events.description: sinister dark figure briefly appears in mirror reflection behind character
flashlight beam sweeps across bathroom to illuminate toilet area

agents.ego_description: standing before bathroom mirror examining reflection, then turning to explore the confined space

white ceramic sink with faucet below mirror

segments.scene_description: In a dimly lit bathroom, the character stands before a mirror where a sinister figure briefly appears in the reflection. The flashlight illuminates the sink and toilet area as the character begins to explore the confined tiled space.

scene_state.functional_zone: bathroom with toilet and exit door

events.description: character approaches bathroom door preparing to exit
approaching brighter doorway revealing the studio space beyond

agents.ego_description: moving through bathroom with flashlight, examining fixtures and approaching the exit door

small window with potted plant on sill
curved metal rack mounted on wall
small framed artwork on wall
tall metal rack with boxes and supplies
doorway leading to brightly lit exterior room

segments.scene_description: The character explores the rear of the bathroom, flashlight illuminating the toilet and a window with a plant. She approaches a metal shelving unit and the exit door, where bright light from the adjacent room becomes visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: film studio backstage with dining area and production equipment

events.description: exits dark bathroom into large sunlit studio space with wooden floors
passing crew members seated at dining table with film equipment

agents.ego_description: walking through the studio space past tables and equipment, observing crew members working

person standing near projection screen in the background

cases and gear stacked near the wall

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the bathroom, the scene opens into a spacious studio with wooden floors and sunlight streaming through windows. The character walks past a dining table where crew members sit among film equipment, heading toward a doorway with bright vanity lights visible beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: dressing room with illuminated vanity mirrors and furniture

events.description: enters dressing room with illuminated vanity mirrors from the studio
examining bookshelf and wall decorations including mounted moose head

agents.ego_description: exploring the dressing room, examining vanity mirrors, armchair, and bookshelves while narrative subtitles appear on screen

tall dispenser with bottle on top

segments.scene_description: The character enters a carpeted dressing room dominated by a brightly lit vanity mirror. She explores the space, examining an armchair, bookshelves, and wall decorations including a mounted moose head, while narrative text appears at the bottom of the screen.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, dimly lit bathroom into a bright, expansive film studio and finally into a detailed dressing room. It begins in a confined tiled space where a flashlight illuminates a sink and a mirror reflecting a sinister figure, before moving toward the rear of the room past a window and metal shelving. As the character reaches the exit, the scene opens into a spacious studio with wooden floors and sunlight streaming through windows, passing a dining table occupied by crew members and film equipment. The camera then glides through a doorway into a carpeted dressing room, where the lighting shifts to the glow of a vanity mirror. Finally, the movement slows to examine an armchair, bookshelves, and a mounted moose head as narrative text appears on the screen.
